overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a foggy industrial wasteland at night in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily along a dirt path toward distant holographic advertising towers, passing utility poles and approaching a solar farm installation, with one vehicle passing by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland outskirts with power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the distant illuminated holographic towers of the city skyline

entered.detail: three tall towers with colorful vertical holographic advertisements glowing against the night sky
series of wooden utility poles with multiple power lines stretching into the distance
unpaved dirt road cutting through the wasteland terrain
dry bushes and desert plants scattered across the dusty ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial wasteland at night, with the camera walking forward along a dirt path. Three massive holographic advertising towers dominate the distant skyline, while power lines run parallel on the left. The environment is desolate and empty, with sparse vegetation visible in the periphery.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching solar farm installation

events.description: vehicle with headlights on passes by from left to right across the dirt road
solar panel arrays become visible on the right horizon as the landscape transitions

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as a vehicle passes by and the landscape opens up to reveal solar installations

notable_agents.action: car driving across the dirt path with headlights illuminating the dust, moving from left to right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising billboard with orange and blue signage mounted on the left side of the path
rows of tilted solar panels installed on the right side of the road, reflecting distant city lights

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, an illuminated billboard appears on the left while a car passes by on the road. The environment transitions to include solar panel arrays on the right horizon. The holographic towers shift to the left side of the frame as the perspective moves forward through the industrial outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: solar farm corridor alongside dirt road

events.description: path curves slightly to the right as the camera moves deeper into the solar farm area

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the solar panel arrays with the industrial cityscape receding into the background on the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera walking past extensive solar panel installations on the right, with the power lines now fading into the distance on the left. The billboard and distant holographic towers have disappeared from view, leaving the solar arrays as the dominant structural element in this desolate industrial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a foggy industrial wasteland at night that shifts from a skyline of holographic towers to a corridor of solar installations. It begins along a desolate dirt path where three massive holographic advertising towers dominate the distant horizon and power lines run parallel to the left. As the camera progresses, an illuminated billboard appears on the left and a car passes by on the road, while the holographic towers gradually shift toward the edge of the frame. The scene then expands to reveal solar panel arrays emerging on the right horizon as the perspective pushes deeper into the industrial outskirts. Finally, the camera moves past extensive solar installations that become the dominant structural element, while the billboard and distant towers fade from view into the darkness.
